description: A timber cruise workbook (timber_cruise.xlsx) contains field data for 80 trees across 10 variable-radius plots. Calculate timber volumes and stand value by populating the 'Volume_Calculations' and 'Stand_Summary' sheets. Required metrics for the 'Volume_Calculations' sheet include Basal_Area_sqft (0.005454 * DBH^2), TPA (BAF / Basal_Area_sqft with BAF=20), Gross_BF_Volume (using b0/b1 coefficients from 'Coefficients'), Net_BF_Volume, Vol_Per_Acre_BF, Stumpage_Per_Acre (using Price_Per_MBF), and Size_Class ('Large' if DBH>=24, 'Medium' if DBH>=16, else 'Small'). The 'Stand_Summary' sheet must include species-specific MBF/Acre and Stumpage $/Acre (averaged over 10 plots), Stand Totals for the 40-acre stand, Quadratic Mean Diameter (QMD), and Harvest Eligibility. Save the updated workbook.
